title: duck's armory & cosmetics
description: a mod that contains new WEAPONS AND COSMETICS like hamburgers and more!
body:
# Do you like servers capes and cosmetics?



Well, you've come to the right mod!
# Features
This mod adds capes, cosmetics, some epic weapons, and decoration blocks!

## Capes
- Moon Cape
- Sun Cape
 - "Creeper" Cape
- Chicken Cape
- Wings Cape
- Axolotl Cape
- Crab Cape
- Enderman Cape

## Cosmetics
- Burger on Head
- and crewmates from the famous video game!

## Weapons
- Sonic Sword
- Katana
- Duck Sword 🦆
- Zoomable crossbow (that doesn't zoom yet)

## Decoration Blocks
- An Imposter Plush
- An Upgraded Fletching Table
- An Adorable  Chest!
